The Later Alligator app lets the user pick a starting time. The starting time defaults to the current year, month, day, hour, minute, and second. The user can then add 0 or more intervals that get added to the starting time. For each interval, they pick the quantity and the unit. The unit can be minutes, hours, days, or years. The app also displays the ending time, which should automatically update as intervals are added or modified.
